hero.title: THÉONÉ
hero.subtitle: Your Global Operations Team, On Demand
hero.desc: There is no need to hire a dedicated team for every cross-border task. THÉONÉ Global Desk acts as your fractional operations team on demand, executing cross-border administration, partnership coordination, and project management.

quick.title: Quick Desk
quick.target: Best for: Resolving immediate bottlenecks in single cross-border operations.
items: Drafting and reviewing official English correspondence for overseas buyers/partners
Refining English presentation materials for global meetings and conference calls
Establishing administrative guardrails and checklists prior to cross-border contracts

mission.title: Mission Desk
mission.target: Best for: Delegating an independent international mission from infrastructure setup to completion.
items: Administrative process management for overseas contract execution
Analyzing global partner requirements and proposing alternative operations
Pitching proposals and initial coordination to secure overseas local partners

project.title: Project Desk
project.target: Best for: Milestone management across complex projects involving multiple stakeholders (expansion, investment, contracts).
items: Execution strategies for global expansion and local operational infrastructure
Overall project management for overseas investment attraction
End-to-end PMO lead for global projects

innovation.title: AI Workflow Infrastructure
innovation.desc: We are developing AI-driven risk management solutions to enhance trust and safety in global trade.

international.title:
Fractional Operator 
 for International Partners
international.value: We provide reliable local operational services for international companies entering the Korean market.

about.title: About THÉONÉ
about.identity: THÉONÉ is a global desk where practitioners who understand both technology and regulations directly execute cross-border business operations.
about.compliance: This service provides business administration and PMO support, and does not constitute legal advice.
about.founderDesc: A New York-licensed attorney with a software engineering background, supporting operations where technology and regulation meet.
